models.name: Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2

models.name: Pro/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1

models.name: qwen-3.5-397b-a17b
models.description: The Qwen3.5 native vision-language series Plus models are built on a hybrid architecture that integrates linear attention mechanisms with sparse mixture-of-experts models.

models.name: Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507
models.description: Qwen3 full series models achieve effective integration of thinking and non-thinking modes, enabling mode switching during conversations.

models.name: qwq-32b
models.description: QwQ is an inference model in the Qwen series. Compared to traditional fine-tuned models, QwQ possesses thinking and reasoning capabilities, enabling significantly enhanced performance in downstream tasks, particularly when tackling challenging problems.

models.name: claude-sonnet-4-6-thinking
models.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is our most capable Sonnet model yet. It’s a full upgrade of the model’s skills across coding, computer use, long-context reasoning, agent planning, knowledge work, and design.

models.name: claude_opus_4.5
models.description: Our newest model, Claude Opus 4.5, is available today. It’s intelligent, efficient, and the best model in the world for coding, agents, and computer use.

models.name: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929-thinking
models.description: Claude Sonnet 4.5 is the best coding model in the world. It's the strongest model for building complex agents. It’s the best model at using computers. And it shows substantial gains in reasoning and math.

models.name: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-thinking
models.description: Claude Haiku 4.5, our latest small model, is available today to all users.

models.name: gpt-5.5
models.description: We are launching GPT-5.5, the smartest and most intuitive model available, bringing new advancements to the way we work on computers.

models.name: gpt-5.2-2025-12-11
models.description: We've launched GPT-5.2, OpenAI's most powerful model series to date, designed for expertise-driven tasks.

models.name: gpt-5.1-2025-11-13
models.description: GPT-5.1 is now available: A smarter, more conversational ChatGPT.

models.name: gpt-5-2025-08-07
models.description: GPT-5 is smarter in every way, delivering more practical responses across mathematics, science, finance, law, and beyond. It's like having a team of experts on standby, ready to answer any question you throw at it.

models.name: o4-mini-high
models.description: Our smartest and most capable models to date with full tool access.

models.name: kimi-k2.5
models.description: Kimi K2.5 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model built through continual pretraining on approximately 15 trillion mixed visual and text tokens atop Kimi-K2-Base. It seamlessly integrates vision and language understanding with advanced agentic capabilities, instant and thinking modes, as well as conversational and agentic paradigms.

models.name: Pro/moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Instruct-0905
models.description: Kimi K2 is our latest Mixture-of-Experts model with 32 billion activated parameters and 1 trillion total parameters. It achieves state-of-the-art performance in frontier knowledge, math, and coding among non-thinking models.

models.name: ling-flash-2.0
models.description: Ling-flash-2.0 is the third model in the Ling 2.0 architecture series released by Ant Group's Ling Team. It is a Model of Experts (MoE) architecture with a total parameter count of 100 billion, though only 6.1 billion parameters are activated per token (4.8 billion for non-word vectors).

models.name: glm-5
models.description: GLM-5 targeting complex systems engineering and long-horizon agentic tasks. Scaling is still one of the most important ways to improve the intelligence efficiency of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). Compared to GLM-4.5, GLM-5 scales from 355B parameters (32B active) to 744B parameters (40B active), and increases pre-training data from 23T to 28.5T tokens.

The GLM-4.7 series represents Zhipu's latest flagship model, designed to enhance coding capabilities, long-term task planning, and tool collaboration for agentic coding scenarios. It has achieved outstanding performance among open-source models on multiple current leaderboards across public benchmarks.

Seed-OSS-36B-Instruct is a 36-billion parameter open-source large language model developed by ByteDance's Seed Team. It is designed for powerful long-context, reasoning, agent and general capabilities, and versatile developer-friendly features.
